name: Death Counter Popup
description: Shows a popup of a death percentage counter

gold-new-best.name: Golden New Best
gold-new-best.description: The popup text will be golden if it's a new best (only applicable to runs from 0)

show-for-completed.name: Show for Completed levels
show-for-completed.description: The popup text will be shown even if the level is completed

issues.info: Report any issue on the Github repo
